title: sporobolus centrifugus
intro: Sporobolus centrifugus, also known as Buffalo Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Consuming Buffalo Grass has been linked to various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and improving digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried powders for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
